# Third-Party Tools

Third-party tools and utilities kept for future use.  
**Not part of VietASR Pro core.**

## Contents

### PyFlame/
C++ flamegraph profiling library. Retained for future performance 
optimization of the inference pipeline.

### pyflame_demos/
Example scripts and demos for PyFlame usage.

## Note
These tools are not required for running VietASR Pro.  
They are kept here for reference and optional profiling work.
